title: Builders Vanilla Expansion
description:
Builders Vanilla+ expands upon Vanilla Minecraft to enhance and provide more resources to building, whilst still respecting the vanilla essentials.

Please note, this pack is meant for creative and adventure mode use only.
body:
**CURRENTLY IN DEVELOPMENT:**
```
- Better Grass
- Iron Melon Stems
- ...
```

# TOP CHOICE VANILLA EXTENDED TEXTUREPACK FOR REALISM BUILDERS*
## ABOUT:
Builders Vanilla+ expands upon Vanilla Minecraft to enhance and provide more resources to building, whilst still respecting the vanilla essentials.

This pack was designed for creative mode.
## FEATURES:

### Improved Blocks
These Blocks keep their Vanilla attributes with very slight Texture or Model changes.
- Short Grass, Tall Grass
- Flowers (not all yet)
- 3D Ladder
- Iron Bars texture, 3D Iron Bar post
- Unlit Campfire without ash
- Unlit Redstone Torch
- Glass Rims (yellow, green, blue, red, brown, black, white)
- Pitcher Plant
- Variated Bookshelves
- Variated Lily Pads
- Variated Bamboo saplings
- Variated Mushrooms (red & brown)
- Random Textures improvements

### Fixed Blocks
These Blocks have been fixed with missing textures when debugged or cut off, to give a better use to a wider variety of implementations.
- Debugged Walls missing texture
- Missing texture on cut door bottom/top
- Open Door Texture Rotation being applied wrong
- Missing texture in cut doors
- Missing texture on cut pistons

### Changed Blocks
These blocks replace less useful blocks or such, that don't make sense of being used in Creative Minecraft to allow for cooler Blocks like those mentioned below:

**Added Blocks:**
- Vertical Planks (#_plank[type=double])
- Additional Door Variants (block_door[type=powered])
- Additional Trapdoor Variants (block_trapdoor[type=powered])
- Additional Fence Gate Variants (block_fence_gate[type=powered])
- Cake Variations (changes cake upon candle placement on top)
- Bark Mulch (podzol[snowy=true])
- Black Gravel (mycelium[snowy=true])
- 4 Lightning Rod Variants (rotation and powered blockstate)
- Tiled Stone Bricks (mossy_/stone_bricks[type=double])
- Shelve Drawers (crafting_table, 2 loom sides)
- Bushes (oak_sapling, spruce_sapling, azalea..)
- Bonsai Tree (cherry_sapling)

**Repurposed Unused Blocks:**
- Dirt Slab (petrified_oak_slab)
- Dead/Dry/Gray Wood Planks (infested_chiseled_stone_bricks)
- Turquoise Planks (waxed_oxidized_cut_copper_block/slab/stair)
- Turquoise Decorated Block (waxed_oxidized_polished_copper_block**)
- White eggs (turtle_egg)

**Replaced Blocks:**
- Clovers (dead_bubble_coral_fan)
- Waterlogged Clovers (dead_bubble_coral_fan[waterlogged=true])
- Hanging Ropes (weeping_vines)
- Striped Spruce Wall (blackstone_wall)
- Green Planks Variants (crimson)
- Sandstone Anvil (chipped_anvil)
- Polished Granite Anvil (damaged_anvil)

### Animals & Mobs
- Bird Variants (parrots)
- Mouse/Rat (silverfish)
### Extras
In **[textures/skin_heads]** you can find skins whose heads u can use in building if u have a mod or plugin to get heads of your skin.

Currently available:
- 5 Different Carlights

- 1 Polished Diorite

_* = in the creative mode vanilla advanced texturepacks category,
